name: InfronAI
description: « A centralized platform that allows you to operate, monitor, and connect multiple AI models or services through a single access point. You benefit from performance monitoring, unified billing, fault tolerance, and high-availability infrastructure

name: Pixalytica
description: « Get comprehensive identity verification reports quickly by uploading a photo and analyzing the information available online. You will receive a structured summary that includes profiles found, public mentions, risk indicators, and additional data

name: Nextify.ai
description: « Quickly generate advertising videos (and UGC) from a simple idea or product photo. Take advantage of numerous templates, scenes, and avatars to create videos tailored to TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube

name: TranslateGemma
description: « A collection of open-source translation models developed by Google DeepMind covering 55+ languages with dedicated two-step training (on billions of translation pairs)

name: Listagrow AI
description: « Automate the integration and optimization of your product listings by transforming your images or raw data into complete pages with titles, descriptions, tags, and SEO metadata. The tool also checks for duplicates and enriches incomplete listings. Integration possible with Shopify or WooCommerce

name: Kutt AI
description: « Produce videos from text or images by defining the mood, visual effects, and output format. Several built-in tools also make it easy to create animated avatars and replace faces or bodies

name: Imgtovid AI
description: « Bring your photos to life in videos with realistic movements and cinematic effects using several AI models (Kling, Runway, Luma, Veo3). The platform generates videos with full control over movement intensity, camera angles, and artistic styles

name: Lyrics to Song AI
description: « Turn your lyrics into complete songs with vocals, instruments, and arrangements in the musical style of your choice. You can set the genre, tempo, and mood to generate songs that can last several minutes

name: Shutterstock
description: « The famous image bank now incorporates AI generation. This means you can create images from simple instructions. The platform has partnered with OpenAI, Meta, and LG AI Research to offer you millions of photos, videos, music, and models with commercial licenses

name: Mockuplabs.ai
description: « Create realistic product mockups for posters, packaging, or T-shirts from an image (or pre-existing templates). The tool offers several scenes, angles, and backgrounds to integrate your creations and generate renderings that can be used in your stores, portfolios, or social media accounts

name: Gemini Personal Intelligence
description: « A next-generation mobile AI assistant that truly understands you and performs tasks across all your Google apps. It can manage your emails, calls, messages, reminders, control your smart home, and much more

name: Claude Healthcare
description: « An AI solution dedicated to healthcare professionals that automates prior authorizations, insurance appeal reviews, clinical documentation, and patient coordination. The assistant can also connect to CMS, ICD-10, NPI Registry, and PubMed databases

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
